caption: A man wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white shirt, and a red tie speaks into a silver microphone held by someone partially visible behind him. The man is captured from the chest up, gesturing with his left hand while speaking. He is positioned against a plain, neutral-colored background. Across the bottom of the screen, a purple and white graphic banner displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". In the top left corner of each frame, a stylized logo for "plustv" is visible. The lower portion of the screen contains various viewing instructions and links, including "WATCH ON DStv CH 408", "StarTimes CH 308", and "WATCH ONLINE WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" in the upper frames, while the lower frames show "SUBSCRIBE WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and "FOLLOW US PLUSTVAFRICA" alongside social media icons. The scene remains virtually static across the frames, with only slight changes in the man's facial expression and hand positioning.
